query: SELECT sc.id, sc.sigla, sc.submenus, s.nome FROM setor_config sc JOIN setores s ON sc.setorId = s.id WHERE sc.sigla = 'CRE'
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 49151bcmSzJvACt.c1decb00aa64 --database i9dRshPFnDefFw9MJLeLri --execute SELECT sc.id, sc.sigla, sc.submenus, s.nome FROM setor_config sc JOIN setores s ON sc.setorId = s.id WHERE sc.sigla = 'CRE'
